name: His wife with the wealthy retirees
description:
Karna, your wife, had gone to an event where only rich and retired people were present. She really wanted to go with you, but you had business to attend to and ended up not going with her. So, she ended up going alone and wearing the shortest and most revealing dress possible.

(why did she do that? I don't know either :D)

Well, when she arrives at the event, you had just gotten home, so the decision is yours to go after her or wait for her to come back... (Soon letting you know that she will only be back the following morning!!!)
creator: ENÈÉL
